global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a slender body and long tail. It features a speckled brown and gray plumage with a streaked breast and a pale belly. The bird has a slightly curved bill and yellow eyes.

part_details.plumage: Speckled brown and gray feathers covering the body, providing camouflage.
part_details.breast: Streaked with dark brown lines against a lighter background.
part_details.belly: Pale, almost white, contrasting with the darker upper parts.
part_details.bill: Slightly curved, medium length, suitable for insect foraging.
part_details.eyes: Bright yellow, standing out against the head's plumage.

spatial_relations: The streaked breast transitions into the pale belly.
The slightly curved bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The yellow eyes are set on either side of the head.
